title: StormCraft
description: Stormcraft is a modpack heavily influenced by ProtoManly's Weather Mod.
body:
Made exclusively for Protomanly's Weather Mod (Discord for that server: https://discord.gg/yEJdxx94 )

 
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9402632a7c61b55863189c352cf306eb8847405e_0.webp)

💀 A Hardcore Tech & Survival Experience with Deadly Weather & Relentless Challenges!

🌀 Tornadoes & Extreme Weather
Brace yourself for ProtoManly's Weather—where tornadoes 🌪️ can rip through your world, flinging mobs, destroying builds, and forcing you to take shelter! Survive brutal storms, temperature swings (Tough As Nails ❄️🔥), and seasonal shifts (Serene Seasons 🍂) as you fight to endure.

⚙️ Deep Automation & Tech
Master Create 🏗️, Mekanism ⚗️, Applied Energistics 2 📦, and Immersive Engineering ⚡ to build advanced factories, automate survival, and power your bunker against the storm.

🌍 Exploration & Danger
Discover vast biomes (Biomes O’ Plenty 🌿 + Terralith 🏔️), but beware—hostile mobs, hunger decay, and environmental hazards make every journey risky.

🛡️ Hardcore Survival Tweaks
Food spoilage & thirst (Farmer’s Delight 🍲 + Tough As Nails 🥵)

Limited resources force smart automation

Dangerous nights & unpredictable disasters

⚠️ Known Issues

Currently having lag issues! (Sodium & Lithium help, but chunk loading may lag)

Chunks load slowly, for lower end devices, I would lower or even possibly disable Distant Horizons to save performance!


# **8 GB RAM MINIMUM. RUNS At 60FPS using a 3080!**



Link to some of the mods:

[Link for Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture) 

[Link for Camera Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-mod)

[Link for Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)
